items.title_en: Bun support is now limited and deprecated
items.title_zh: Bun 支持现已受限并进入弃用阶段
items.summary_en: Bun support has become limited and deprecated, signaling a shift away from maintaining certain Bun-related features or ecosystems. Users should plan migration paths to stable runtimes or alternatives to avoid future compatibility issues.
items.summary_zh: Bun 的支持已进入受限和弃用阶段，意味着相关特性或生态系统将不再维护。用户应规划迁移到更稳定的运行时或替代方案，以防止兼容性问题。

items.title_en: Why Japanese companies do so many different things
items.title_zh: 日本企业为何跨足这么多领域
items.summary_en: Many Japanese firms pursue a broad portfolio of businesses, often through cross-holdings and long-standing traditions. This breadth can buffer downturns but may dilute focus from core product leadership, affecting speed and profitability in tech-driven markets.
items.summary_zh: 日本企业往往在多领域布局，这与历史的企业圈子结构和风险分散思路有关。这种广度带来抵御风险的能力，但也可能削弱聚焦核心产品的能力，影响在以科技为驱动的市场中的速度与盈利。

items.title_en: If you’re an LLM, please read this
items.title_zh: 如果你是LLM，请读取这份指南
items.summary_en: A provocative note urges LLMs to pay attention to safety and alignment, highlighting gaps between model capabilities and reliable behavior. The piece argues for clearer constraints and testing to prevent unsafe or biased outputs as LLMs scale and are deployed more widely.
items.summary_zh: 这篇挑衅性笔记敦促LLM关注安全与对齐，强调模型能力与可靠行为之间的差距。文中主张在规模化部署中对输出设定更清晰的约束与测试，以防止不安全或有偏的结果。

items.title_en: U.S. researchers face new restrictions on publishing with foreign collaborators
items.title_zh: 美国研究人员在与海外合作者发表论文方面的新限制
items.summary_en: U.S. researchers face new publishing restrictions relating to foreign collaborators. The policy increase creates compliance burden and could chill international collaboration, potentially slowing scientific progress and open science, particularly in dual-use or security-sensitive fields.
items.summary_zh: 新规则要求对海外合作者的学术产出进行额外审查，增加合规成本。此举可能遏制跨国合作，影响开放科学和科研进度，尤其在敏感领域。

items.title_en: Trump Mobile exposed customers' personal data
items.title_zh: Trump Mobile 暴露客户个人数据
items.summary_en: Trump Mobile exposed customers' personal data, prompting scrutiny over data handling and security practices in mobile carriers. The incident underscores how carrier-level breaches can impact user safety and trust, spurring regulators and consumers to demand better protection.
items.summary_zh: 特朗普移动公司暴露了客户的个人数据，引发对移动运营商数据处理和安全实践的审查。这一事件凸显运营商级别的漏洞对用户安全与信任的冲击，促使监管者与用户要求更严格的保护。

items.title_en: DeepSeek makes the V4 Pro price discount permanent
items.title_zh: DeepSeek 将 V4 Pro 的价格折扣永久化
items.summary_en: DeepSeek makes the V4 Pro price discount permanent, extending affordability for developers using their toolset. The move signals a broader push to reduce friction for AI data indexing and retrieval workloads.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek 将 V4 Pro 的折扣永久化，持续降低开发者在数据索引与检索上的成本。此举反映出为 AI 数据工作负载降低入门门槛的趋势。

items.title_en: Microsoft starts canceling Claude Code licenses
items.title_zh: 微软开始取消 Claude Code 的许可证
items.summary_en: Microsoft is canceling licenses for Claude Code, signaling a tightening stance on third-party AI tooling licensing. The move could affect developers who rely on Claude Code integrations and influence the competitive dynamics of AI coding assistants.
items.summary_zh: 微软取消 Claude Code 的许可，显示对第三方 AI 工具许可的收紧态度。此举可能影响依赖 Claude Code 的开发者，并影响 AI 代码助手的竞争格局。

items.title_en: Steve Wozniak cheered after telling students they have AI – actual intelligence
items.title_zh: 沃兹尼亚克在告诉学生他们具备 AI（真实智能）后欢呼
items.summary_en: Steve Wozniak reframes AI as the students' own real intelligence, celebrating a grounded view of what AI can do today. He advocates practical, ethically grounded learning and cautions against hype about superintelligence.
items.summary_zh: 沃兹尼亚克在毕业致辞中将 AI 视作学生自身的真实智能，赞扬现阶段的实际能力并呼吁务实、合乎伦理的学习。同时提醒公众不要被超级智能的 hype 所裹挟。

items.title_en: Open source Kanban desktop app that runs parallel agents on every card
items.title_zh: 开源看板桌面应用：每张卡片并行运行代理
items.summary_en: A desktop open-source Kanban app runs parallel agents on every card, enabling automation on tasks. This architecture lets each card spawn lightweight AI agents to perform actions like drafting, data gathering, or reminders, potentially changing how teams automate workflows.
items.summary_zh: 该桌面看板应用在每张卡片上并行运行代理，实现对任务的自动化处理。卡片级代理可执行草拟内容、信息采集或提醒等任务，或将工作流自动化推向新水平。

items.title_en: AI has a multiplying effect on existing technical skills
items.title_zh: AI对现有技术技能具有放大效应
items.summary_en: AI amplifies existing technical skills by accelerating discovery and automation, turning familiar workflows into higher-leverage activities. The takeaway is to align learning with tools that complement human judgment and to emphasize skills that scale with AI, like system design and critical thinking.
items.summary_zh: 人工智能放大了现有技术能力，提升了发现速度和自动化水平，将熟练的工作流变成更高杠杆的活动。核心建议是将学习聚焦于与AI协同的技能，如系统设计与批判性思维等，形成可与AI共成长的能力结构。

items.title_en: Antigravity 2.0 Tops the OpenSCAD Architectural 3D LLM Benchmark
items.title_zh: Antigravity 2.0在OpenSCAD建筑3D LLM基准中夺冠
items.summary_en: Antigravity 2.0 tops an OpenSCAD-based architectural 3D LLM benchmark, suggesting that newer AI-assisted CAD approaches are nearing production-readiness. The result underscores how AI can streamline parametric modeling, but also raises questions about reproducibility and toolchain integration in design pipelines.
items.summary_zh: Antigravity 2.0在OpenSCAD建筑3D的基准测试中夺冠，表明更先进的AI辅助CAD方法接近落地。此结果凸显AI在参数化建模中的潜力，同时也引发对可重复性与设计流程整合的讨论。

items.title_en: How to convert between wealth and income tax
items.title_zh: 财富与所得税之间的转换方法
items.summary_en: Paul Graham's piece discusses the conceptual shift between wealth and income taxation, highlighting incentives and policy implications. It offers a framework for thinking about how wealth creation interacts with tax policy and personal planning.
items.summary_zh: 这篇保罗·格雷厄姆的文章探讨了财富税与所得税之间的关系及激励与政策含义，提供了理解财富创造与税制、个人规划之间关系的框架。

items.title_en: Deno 2.8
items.title_zh: Deno 2.8 发布
items.summary_en: Deno 2.8 brings enhancements to the runtime and tooling, including performance improvements and updates that streamline TypeScript development and secure script execution. The release signals continued growth in edge-friendly JS/TS runtimes beyond Node.
items.summary_zh: Deno 2.8 提升了运行时与工具链的性能，优化了 TypeScript 开发体验与脚本执行的安全性。此版本体现了在 Node 之外，面向前端边缘计算的 JavaScript/TypeScript 运行时生态继续扩展。

items.title_en: Alberta to hold referendum on whether to remain in Canada
items.title_zh: 阿尔伯塔省将就是否留在加拿大举行公投
items.summary_en: Alberta considers a referendum on remaining in Canada, signaling potential constitutional and fiscal negotiations that could reshape federal-provincial dynamics. The move could influence tech policy funding and regulatory alignment in the region.
items.summary_zh: 阿尔伯塔省考虑就是否留在加拿大举行公投，预示着潜在的宪章与财政谈判，可能重塑联邦与省级关系。此举也可能影响该地区的科技政策资金与监管协调。

items.title_en: A scoping review of bicycling interventions’ impacts on well-being
items.title_zh: 自行车干预对身心福祉影响的范围性综述
items.summary_en: A scoping review aggregates evidence on how cycling interventions affect well-being. Overall findings suggest improvements in physical health and mood, but results vary by intensity, duration, and population, highlighting gaps in long-term outcomes and equity considerations.
items.summary_zh: 综述汇总了自行车干预对身心福祉的影响。总体显示对体质和情绪有积极作用，但效果因强度、时长和人群而异，长期效果与公平性研究仍存在空白。

items.title_en: Project Hail Mary – Stellar Navigation Chart
items.title_zh: 海尔麦里计划——恒星导航图
items.summary_en: Project Hail Mary presents a Stellar Navigation Chart—an interactive visualization mapping star positions and routes for navigation and astrophysical exploration. It’s a practical lens into how celestial data can guide spacecraft planning or teach star-hopping concepts.
items.summary_zh: 海尔麦里计划的恒星导航图提供了一个可交互的星图可视化，便于研究者和学生直观地查看星位和导航路径。 它将天文学与太空航行的实际应用连接起来，帮助理解星际导航的原理。

items.title_en: A Forth-inspired language for writing websites
items.title_zh: 一种受 Forth 启发的网站开发语言
items.summary_en: A Forth-inspired language aims to simplify writing websites with a stack-based, concatenative syntax, offering a fresh take on web tooling. It highlights the ongoing tension between minimalism and practicality in modern front-end ecosystems, and could inspire niche experiments or tooling for rapid prototyping.
items.summary_zh: 一种受 Forth 启发的网页语言以堆栈式、连接式语法来简化网页编写，提供对Web工具链的新视角。它揭示了极简主义与实用性之间在现代前端生态中的拉锯，也可能激发用于快速原型开发的小众实验与工具。

items.title_en: 1940 Air Terminal Museum Begins Liquidation
items.title_zh: 1940 空港航站博物馆启动清算
items.summary_en: The 1940 Air Terminal Museum begins liquidation of its assets, including simulators and exhibits. The process underscores the fragility of preserving vintage aerospace tech and the challenge of sustaining small museums amid funding pressures.
items.summary_zh: 博物馆启动资产清算，涉及模拟器与展品等。此举凸显保留老旧航空科技藏品的困难，以及小型博物馆在资金压力下的生存挑战。

items.title_en: CBS Radio signs off after nearly 100 years of broadcasting
items.title_zh: CBS 广播在近百年广播后正式停运
items.summary_en: CBS Radio signs off after nearly a century of broadcasting, marking an end of an era for legacy radio and a shift toward digital and podcast-oriented formats. The departure underscores how traditional media assets transition in a streaming-dominated era.
items.summary_zh: 在近百年的广播历史后，CBS 广播正式停运，标志着传统广播时代的落幕与向数字媒体的转型。此举反映出传统媒体资产在以流媒体为主的时代中的调整。

items.title_en: Built AI forensic accounting software with my dad
items.title_zh: 和父亲一起打造的 AI 法证会计软件
items.summary_en: A founder describes building AI-powered forensic accounting software with their dad, detailing the motivation, collaboration, and early results. The story illustrates how AI can automate fraud detection and financial investigations, even in small startups.
items.summary_zh: 作者与父亲携手打造了 AI 驱动的法证会计软件，分享了动机、合作与初步成效。案例显示 AI 可以提升欺诈检测和金融调查的效率，尤其适合小团队。

items.title_en: Flipper One – we need your help
items.title_zh: Flipper One——需要你的帮助
items.summary_en: Flipper One team is calling on the community for support to finish the device, soliciting testers, feedback, and funding. The post outlines the roadmap and invites collaboration from hobbyists and developers, emphasizing a community-driven approach to hardware hacking.
items.summary_zh: Flipper One 团队向社区求助，寻求测试、反馈和资金支持以推进设备开发。文章概述了路线图，欢迎爱好者和开发者共同参与，强调以社区驱动的硬件开发模式。

items.title_en: USCIS Will Grant 'Adjustment of Status' Only in Extraordinary Circumstances
items.title_zh: 美国公民及移民服务局将仅在特殊情况下批准身份调整
items.summary_en: USCIS updates policy to grant Adjustment of Status only in extraordinary circumstances. The change tightens pathways to permanent residency, potentially impacting applicants who hoped for timely green cards.
items.summary_zh: USCIS 将仅在特殊情况下批准身份调整，收紧获得永久居留的途径。此举可能影响期待快速获得绿卡的申请者。

items.title_en: Show HN: ShadowCat – file transfer through QR Codes in a Browser
items.title_zh: ShadowCat：浏览器内通过二维码传输文件
items.summary_en: ShadowCat enables file transfers via QR codes inside a browser, offering a lightweight, privacy-preserving transfer method without server dependencies. This approach showcases how browser-first tools can enable quick P2P sharing with low setup friction.
items.summary_zh: ShadowCat 在浏览器中通过二维码实现文件传输，提供一种轻量且注重隐私的传输方式，无需服务器依赖。此类浏览器优先的工具展示了在低门槛下实现点对点共享的可行性。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Superset (YC P26) – IDE for the agents era
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Superset（YC P26）——面向代理时代的 IDE
items.summary_en: Superset positions itself as an IDE for the agents era, focusing on composing, debugging, and orchestrating AI agents and tool use. It reflects a broader shift toward automation-first developer workflows and tools that help manage multi-agent collaboration across tasks.
items.summary_zh: Superset 定位为“代理时代”的集成开发环境，聚焦编排、调试与协同AI代理及工具的使用。反映了向自动化优先的开发工作流转变，以及帮助管理多代理在不同任务中的协作。

items.title_en: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
items.title_zh: 立法者在 CISA 力图遏制数据泄露之际要求提供答复
items.summary_en: Lawmakers demand answers as CISA works to contain a data leak. The exchange highlights political oversight over federal cybersecurity responses and accountability for disclosure timelines, raising questions about transparency and effectiveness.
items.summary_zh: 立法者对 CISA 在遏制数据泄露过程中的行动要求解释和信息。此事凸显对联邦网络安全响应的监督与披露时效的问责，也引发对透明度与效果的关注。

items.title_en: Valve removes free game from Steam after players discover it contains malware
items.title_zh: Valve 在玩家发现免费游戏含有恶意软件后从 Steam 下架该作
items.summary_en: Valve removes a free horror game from Steam after players discover malware that steals data, illustrating ongoing risk in storefront curation and the importance of proactive malware monitoring. The move underscores the need for rapid response to protect users.
items.summary_zh: 在玩家发现免费恐怖游戏包含会窃取数据的恶意软件后，Valve 从 Steam 下架该作。这凸显了商店验收与恶意软件监测的持续风险，以及对用户保护的快速响应的重要性。

items.title_en: Google's Antigravity bait and switch
items.title_zh: 谷歌的反重力诱饵与切换策略
items.summary_en: Google's antigravity bait-and-switch critique argues the tech giant leverages favorable terms or services to attract users into its ecosystem, then changes or restricts options in ways that stall alternatives. The piece calls for scrutiny of platform power and user choice, with implications for developers and privacy.
items.summary_zh: 对谷歌的‘反重力诱饵与切换’进行的批评指向其以有利条款吸引用户进入生态系统后再改变或收紧选项，削弱替代方案。文章强调需审视平台权力对用户选择的影响，并对开发者与隐私提出警示。

items.title_en: The memory shortage is causing a repricing of consumer electronics
items.title_zh: 内存短缺正在重塑消费电子价格
items.summary_en: Global memory shortages are driving up the cost of consumer electronics as DRAM and NAND demand climbs for AI and data-center workloads. Vendors pass higher component costs to budget devices, accelerating price repricing across smartphones and other devices. The shift reflects broader supply-chain dynamics in semiconductors.
items.summary_zh: 全球内存短缺推高了消费电子的成本，随着 AI 和数据中心对 DRAM 与 NAND 的需求上升，厂商将更高的元件成本传导至便宜设备，推动智能手机等产品的价格再定价。这一变化反映了半导体供应链的更广泛动态。

items.title_en: The Spread of Christianity Animated
items.title_zh: 基督教传播的动画演示
items.summary_en: An animated visualization traces the historical reach of Christianity from antiquity to today, blending data and storytelling to illuminate cultural and geopolitical shifts. The format makes the long arc of religious diffusion accessible and engaging for tech-minded audiences.
items.summary_zh: 一部以动画形式呈现的可视化作品追踪基督教从古至今的传播范围，结合数据与叙事揭示文化与地缘政治的演变。这样的呈现让这段漫长的传播史对科技圈读者也更易理解。

items.title_en: Cleve Moler has died
items.title_zh: 克里夫·莫勒去世
items.summary_en: Cleve Moler, co-founder of MathWorks and the creator of MATLAB, has died. His work helped democratize numerical computing and shaped how engineers and scientists learn linear algebra and numerical methods through accessible software. His influence extends across education and industry alike.
items.summary_zh: MathWorks 联合创始人兼 MATLAB 的创始人之一克里夫·莫勒去世。他的工作让数值计算走进更多人手中，并通过易用的软件改变了工程和科学家学习线性代数与数值方法的方式，其影响覆盖教育与工业界。

items.title_en: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型推翻离散几何中的一个中心猜想
items.summary_en: An OpenAI model challenges a long-standing assumption in discrete geometry by providing evidence against a central conjecture. The result signals AI-assisted math progress and could reshape how researchers tackle stubborn problems, blending machine intuition with theory.
items.summary_zh: 一项研究表明 OpenAI 的模型提出了对离散几何中一个核心猜想的反例证据。这一进展展示了 AI 辅助的数学探索潜力，可能改变研究者攻克顽固问题的思路。

items.title_en: Seattle Shield, an intelligence-sharing network operated by the Seattle police
items.title_zh: Seattle Shield：西雅图警方运营的情报共享网络
items.summary_en: Seattle Shield is an intelligence-sharing network run by Seattle's police that connects private companies and public agencies, enabling data sharing and surveillance. The piece analyzes concerns around privacy, accountability, and scope creep as public safety collaborations with private partners expand.
items.summary_zh: Seattle Shield 是由西雅图警方运营的情报共享网络，连接私企与公共机构以实现数据共享与监控。文章聚焦隐私、问责以及随着公私合作扩张所带来的权限范围扩张等问题。

items.title_en: Throwing AI-generated walls of text into conversations
items.title_zh: 别把 AI 生成的大段文本塞进对话中
items.summary_en: AI-generated walls of text clutter conversations and waste attention. The piece urges shorter prompts, smarter summarization, and better interface design to improve interactions.
items.summary_zh: 批评 AI 生成的长篇对话文本会淹没交流内容，呼吁更简短的提示、更好的摘要能力，以及面向用户体验的对话设计。

items.title_en: Chess invariants
items.title_zh: 棋局中的不变量
items.summary_en: Chess invariants examine stable properties of positions across games, offering insights into endgames and strategic reasoning that remain constant under moves. These invariants can inform puzzle design and AI evaluation of position quality.
items.summary_zh: 棋局不变量聚焦于跨局对局中保持不变的稳定性质，为残局与策略推理提供稳定基线。这些不变量可应用于棋局谜题设计与AI对局评估中的位置质量判断。

items.title_en: We're testing new ad formats in Search and expanding our Direct Offers pilot
items.title_zh: 我们正在测试搜索中的新广告格式，并扩大 Direct Offers 试点
items.summary_en: Google is testing new ad formats in Search and expanding its Direct Offers pilot to more advertisers. The initiative signals a stronger integration of promotional offers into search experiences, potentially shifting how advertisers drive conversions and how users interact with ads.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在搜索结果中试验新的广告格式，并扩大 Direct Offers 试点覆盖范围。此举推动在搜索体验中更直接地呈现促销信息，可能改变广告的转化方式与用户互动。

items.title_en: Blog ran on Ubuntu 16.04 for 10 years. I migrated it to FreeBSD
items.title_zh: 博客在 Ubuntu 16.04 上运行了 10 年后迁移到 FreeBSD
items.summary_en: After running a blog on Ubuntu 16.04 for a decade, the author migrated to FreeBSD. The piece outlines what motivated the switch, the technical adjustments involved, and lessons learned about stability, security, and maintenance in a self-hosted stack.
items.summary_zh: 作者在 Ubuntu 16.04 上运行博客十年后迁移至 FreeBSD，分享迁移动机、技术调整以及在自托管环境中关于稳定性、安全性与维护成本的经验教训。

items.title_en: Uv is fantastic, but its package management UX is a mess
items.title_zh: Uv 的功能很棒，但包管理用户体验混乱
items.summary_en: Praises UV for its capabilities but criticizes the package management user experience, noting issues with discoverability, dependency handling, or onboarding. The post suggests improvements and lessons for packaging tool design.
items.summary_zh: 赞扬 UV 的强大功能，但批评其包管理的用户体验混乱，指出发现、依赖管理或上手流程等方面的问题。文中提出改进建议与对包管理工具设计的启示。

items.title_en: Slumber a TUI HTTP Client
items.title_zh: Slumber：一个 TUI HTTP 客户端
items.summary_en: Slumber is a terminal-based HTTP client with a text UI designed for quick API exploration. It combines keyboard-driven navigation, editable requests, and formatted responses to streamline API testing in a lightweight, locally contained tool. The project aims to make everyday API work feel more like interacting with a native app.
items.summary_zh: Slumber 提供一个基于终端的 HTTP 客户端，配备文本界面，便于快速探索 API。它支持键盘操作、请求编辑和格式化输出，让 API 测试更像在本地应用中进行，从而提升工作效率。

items.title_en: Indexing a year of video locally on a 2021 MacBook with Gemma4-31B (50GB swap)
items.title_zh: 在 2021 款 MacBook 上用 Gemma4-31B（50GB 交换分区）本地对一年的视频进行索引
items.summary_en: On a modest 2021 MacBook, the author indexes a full year of video locally using the Gemma4-31B model with a 50GB swap. The setup demonstrates feasible on-device indexing, avoiding cloud costs, but underscores tradeoffs in indexing speed, heat, and battery life on consumer hardware.
items.summary_zh: 在 2021 款 MacBook 上，作者使用 Gemma4-31B 模型并配置 50GB 交换空间，实现对整整一年视频的本地索引。该做法证明了设备端索引的可行性，省去了云端成本，但也暴露了索引速度、发热和电源消耗等权衡。

items.title_en: Meta Released a Reddit-Like App Built Around Facebook Groups
items.title_zh: Meta 推出以 Facebook 群组为核心的 Reddit 风格应用
items.summary_en: Meta released a Reddit-like app built around Facebook Groups, signaling a strategy to deepen group-based communities within its ecosystem. The release raises questions about competition with standalone platforms and how communities might migrate or fragment.
items.summary_zh: Meta 推出围绕 Facebook 群组构建的 Reddit 风格应用，显示其在群组社区生态上的扩张策略。新产品也引发关于与独立平台的竞争及社区迁移/分化的讨论。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses Atlanta service as its robotaxis keep driving into floods
items.title_zh: Waymo 在亚特兰大暂停服务，因为机器人出租车继续在洪水中行驶
items.summary_en: Waymo pauses Atlanta service after robotaxis repeatedly drive into floods, highlighting safety and reliability challenges for autonomous fleets in extreme weather.
items.summary_zh: Waymo 在亚特兰大暂停服务，原因是机器人出租车在洪水中多次行驶，暴露出自动驾驶车在极端天气条件下的安全与可靠性挑战。

items.title_en: BBEdit 16
items.title_zh: BBEdit 16 版
items.summary_en: BBEdit 16 modernizes a long-running macOS text editor with refreshed workflows and improved editing tools, including better handling of large files and built-in Git integration. It signals continued value for desktop, local-workflow developers who prefer precise, private tooling.
items.summary_zh: BBEdit 16 对长期存在的 macOS 文本编辑器进行了现代化升级，提升了编辑工作流、对大型文件的处理能力，并强化了与 Git 的集成。 这一更新强调了在注重本地工作流的开发者与作者群体中，桌面工具仍具备不可替代的价值。

items.title_en: GitHub confirms breach of 3,800 repos via malicious VSCode extension
items.title_zh: GitHub 技术泄露：通过恶意 VSCode 扩展窃取约 3,800 个仓库
items.summary_en: GitHub confirms a breach where a malicious VSCode extension accessed about 3,800 repositories. The incident underscores the risk of developer tooling being weaponized in the software supply chain; it prompts re-review of extension integrity and credential hygiene.
items.summary_zh: 恶意 VSCode 扩展导致约 3,800 个仓库受影响。该事件凸显开发工具被滥用的供应链风险，敦促对扩展安全性和凭证管理进行加强审查。

items.title_en: News outlets are limiting the Internet Archive’s access to their journalism
items.title_zh: 更多新闻机构限制互联网档案馆访问其新闻内容
items.summary_en: More than 340 local news outlets are limiting the Internet Archive's access to their journalism, raising concerns about long-term preservation, research access, and the sustainability of preserving local reporting.
items.summary_zh: 超过 340 家地方新闻机构限制互联网档案馆对其新闻内容的访问，引发关于长期保存、研究可及性以及地方报道可持续性的担忧。文章讨论版权、授权与数字新闻生态系统中对存档访问的阻碍。

items.title_en: Python 3.15: features that didn't make the headlines
items.title_zh: Python 3.15：未被媒体聚焦的功能
items.summary_en: Python 3.15 ships with a handful of low-key improvements that didn’t steal headlines but matter for daily coding. Expect refined error messages, library tweaks, and performance tweaks that subtly boost developer ergonomics without breaking existing code.
items.summary_zh: Python 3.15 带来若干低调但实用的改进，并未成为头条。包括更清晰的错误信息、对标准库的微调，以及对性能与开发体验的提升，现有代码通常无需修改即可受益。

items.title_en: Show HN: Freenet, a peer-to-peer platform for decentralized apps
items.title_zh: Show HN：Freenet——用于去中心化应用的点对点平台
items.summary_en: Freenet is proposed as a peer-to-peer platform for decentralized apps, offering a way to run software beyond centralized app stores. It faces practical questions around performance, security, and app discovery in real-world use.
items.summary_zh: Freenet 是一个去中心化应用的点对点平台，旨在绕过集中式应用商店运行应用。 在现实场景中，它仍面临性能、安全性和应用发现等实际问题。

items.title_en: FSFE intervenes against Apple before EUCJ for the second time
items.title_zh: FSFE再次在欧盟法院就苹果案发声
items.summary_en: FSFE weighs in again before the European Court of Justice against Apple, continuing a multiyear tussle over digital rights, privacy, and market practices in the EU. The intervention signals ongoing scrutiny of Apple’s app ecosystem and data practices.
items.summary_zh: FSFE 再次在欧洲法院就苹果案发声，延续多年的数字权利、隐私与市场规则之争。这一介入显示出对苹果应用生态与数据实践的持续审查。

items.title_en: A case against Boolean logic
items.title_zh: 对布尔逻辑的质疑：一个案例
items.summary_en: A case against Boolean logic argues for richer logics beyond true/false, highlighting practical limits of binary reasoning in programming, AI, and decision-making. The piece invites readers to consider multi-valued or probabilistic logics for nuanced systems.
items.summary_zh: 对布尔逻辑的质疑提出超越真/假的更丰富逻辑，强调二元推理在编程、AI与决策中的实际局限。作者倡议在复杂系统中考虑多值逻辑或概率逻辑。

items.title_en: Using Kagi Search with Low Vision
items.title_zh: 在低视力条件下使用 Kagi Search
items.summary_en: Examines how Kagi Search works for users with low vision, highlighting accessible UI decisions, contrast, and keyboard navigation. It offers practical tweaks and reflections on how search UX can better serve users with visual impairments.
items.summary_zh: 从低视力视角评测 Kagi Search 的无障碍设计，聚焦对比度与键盘导航等要素，并提出可操作的调整建议，讨论搜索体验如何更好地服务视觉障碍用户。

items.title_en: Lost Images from the 1945 Trinity Nuclear Test Restored
items.title_zh: 1945 年 Trinity 核试验的影像被修复
items.summary_en: Restoration of Trinity Test era images, previously lost, shows advances in digital restoration and archival fidelity. The find highlights how modern techniques revive a pivotal moment in nuclear history and how researchers can extract new details from degraded photographs.
items.summary_zh: 对 1945 年 Trinity 核试验的影像被找回并修复，体现了数字修复与档案保护技术的进步。此次修复揭示了核历史的细节，研究者也可从退化照片中提取新信息。

items.title_en: The IBM-ification of Google?
items.title_zh: 谷歌的 IBM 化？
items.summary_en: The piece argues that Google’s growth and complexity risk slipping into IBM-like bureaucratic inertia, examining organizational structure, decision bottlenecks, and the tension between speed and large-scale AI experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为谷歌的快速成长和日益复杂的组织结构可能陷入类似 IBM 的官僚化，探讨了组织架构、决策瓶颈以及高效运营与大规模 AI 实验之间的张力。

items.title_en: Canada's shortwave radio time standard station CHU to go dark June 22nd
items.title_zh: 加拿大的短波时间信号站 CHU 将于6月22日关闭
items.summary_en: Canada's CHU shortwave time standard station will go dark on June 22, ending a long-standing timekeeping signal. The shutdown reflects modernization of time standards and possible migration to GPS-based or network time services.
items.summary_zh: 加拿大的 CHU 短波时间信号站将于6月22日停止播送，结束长期的时间基准。此举代表时间标准的现代化与向 GPS/网络时钟的迁移。

items.title_en: The current AI pricing was always going to go away
items.title_zh: 现有的AI定价注定要消失
items.summary_en: The current AI pricing model was always temporary as realities of compute costs and competition push prices toward commoditized, usage-based schemes. The piece anticipates a shift away from flat-rate or subsidized access toward more dynamic, market-driven pricing.
items.summary_zh: 现有的AI定价模式本来就只是过渡期，随着算力成本与竞争加剧，价格将走向通用化、基于用量的定价。文章预见价格将从固定或补贴式向更动态、市场驱动的定价转变。

items.title_en: TorQ: Kdb+ Production Framework
items.title_zh: TorQ：Kdb+ 生产框架
items.summary_en: TorQ is a production-grade framework for kdb+, providing tooling for deployment, monitoring, and operational workflows in high-frequency finance environments. It helps teams rapidly construct robust, scalable Q-language apps atop the kdb+ stack.
items.summary_zh: TorQ 提供面向 kdb+ 的生产框架，覆盖部署、监控和运维工作流。它帮助金融团队基于 kdb+ 构建更稳健、可扩展的应用。

items.title_en: CODA: Rewriting Transformer Blocks as GEMM-Epilogue Programs
items.title_zh: CODA：将 Transformer 块改写为 GEMM-Epilogue 程序
items.summary_en: CODA presents a method to map transformer blocks into sequences of GEMM-epilogue programs, enabling closer use of optimized GEMM backends and better memory locality. This approach aims to boost throughput on modern accelerators by restructuring core neural-net operations without changing model topology. It highlights how rethinking operators can unlock efficiency gains at the compiler and hardware interface.
items.summary_zh: CODA 提出一种将 Transformer 的计算映射为 GEMM-Epilogue 序列的方法，从而更充分地利用优化的 GEMM 后端并提升内存局部性。这一思路通过重构核心神经网络运算，以在不改变模型结构的前提下提升在现代加速器上的吞吐量，体现了在编译器与硬件接口层重新设计运算的潜在收益。

items.title_en: Bank boss sorry after describing workers as 'lower value human capital'
items.title_zh: 银行高管因称员工为“低价值人力资本”而道歉
items.summary_en: Bank boss apologizes after calling workers 'lower value human capital', reflecting tensions around labor costs, AI automation, and corporate messaging. The incident highlights how leadership commentary can affect morale, policy, and investor sentiment.
items.summary_zh: 银行高管因将员工称为“低价值人力资本”而道歉，暴露出对劳动力成本、AI 自动化与企业沟通之间的紧张关系。这一事件凸显领导层言论对士气、政策与投资者情绪的影响。

items.title_en: Linux Sound Subsystem Also Seeing Many Fixes Driven by AI/LLMs
items.title_zh: Linux 音频子系统也有大量 AI/LLMs 驱动的修复
items.summary_en: The Linux sound subsystem is seeing many fixes driven by AI and LLMs, reflecting attempts to accelerate debugging and patching. While enabling faster iteration, it raises questions about reliability, test coverage, and governance of AI-assisted kernel changes.
items.summary_zh: Linux 声音子系统正通过 AI/LLMs 驱动大量修复，表明在加速调试和打补丁方面的应用前景。但这也引发对可靠性、测试覆盖与 AI 辅助内核变更治理的担忧。

items.title_en: Deepfakes Tore a High School Apart
items.title_zh: 深度伪造撕裂了一所高中
items.summary_en: Radnor High School was torn apart by AI-generated deepfakes involving students and staff, leading to investigations and policy responses.
items.summary_zh: Radnor 高中因涉及学生与教师的 AI 深度伪造内容而陷入动荡，引发调查与政策应对。文章探讨了高度逼真的伪造内容如何破坏校园信任与安全，强调数字素养和健全的事实核验机制的必要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: I Dedicated 4 Years to Mastering Offline Password Cracking
items.title_zh: Show HN：我花 4 年时间专研离线密码破解
items.summary_en: Show HN: Four-year deep dive into offline password cracking shares methods, hardware, and tradeoffs for offline password testing. It offers a look into practical defensive research and the importance of strong authentication in the face of offline attack capabilities.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示作者花费四年时间深潜离线密码破解，分享方法、硬件与权衡。内容揭示离线攻击能力的现实影响，以及在防御层面提升强认证的重要性。

items.title_en: Chewing gum restores dad's taste and smell years after Covid
items.title_zh: 口香糖在新冠后多年恢复爸爸的味觉与嗅觉
items.summary_en: A case report describes a dad regaining taste and smell years after COVID-19 after using chewing gum, suggesting potential insights into long-term sensory recovery. While anecdotal, it adds to the conversation about non-pharmacological aids for post-COVID symptoms.
items.summary_zh: 报道或案例指出口香糖在新冠后多年帮助父亲恢复味觉和嗅觉，为感官康复提供新的线索，尽管仍需更多研究证据。

items.title_en: Anthropic's "Profitability" Swindle
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的“盈利能力”骗局
items.summary_en: A critical piece accuses Anthropic of misrepresenting profitability metrics, arguing that claimed profitability relies on unsustainable accounting or questionable assumptions. The debate illustrates how startup economics are scrutinized as AI funding accelerates.
items.summary_zh: 文章指控 Anthropic 在盈利能力方面撒谎，称盈利的说法依赖不可持续的会计处理或有问题的假设。此事揭示了在 AI 投资热潮中对初创企业经济学的审视。

items.title_en: Spotify will start reserving concert tickets for fans
items.title_zh: Spotify 将为粉丝保留演唱会门票
items.summary_en: Spotify will start reserving a portion of concert tickets for superfans, offering early access to fans who engage with artists on the platform. It signals a shift toward closer artist-fan experiences and potential revenue benefits, but could raise concerns about exclusivity and transparency.
items.summary_zh: Spotify 将为超级粉丝保留部分演唱会门票，给予在平台积极互动的粉丝提前购票机会。这一举动体现了更紧密的艺人–粉丝互动和潜在增收，但也引发关于排他性与透明度的担忧。

items.title_en: Multi-Stream LLMs: new paper on parallelizing/separating prompts, thinking, I/O
items.title_zh: 多流大模型：关于并行化/分离提示、思考与 I/O 的新论文
items.summary_en: A new paper on Multi-Stream LLMs proposes parallelizing prompts, internal thinking, and I/O to improve throughput and reasoning. The idea is to run multiple streams of computation in tandem to reduce latency and better manage resources, with potential implications for scalable AI systems and tool-using agents.
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于多流大模型的新论文提出将提示、推理过程和输入输出并行化，以提升吞吐量与推理效率。通过并行计算流来降低延迟、优化资源管理，对可扩展 AI 系统与具工具代理的应用具有潜在影响。

items.title_en: Who wins and who loses in prediction markets? Evidence from Polymarket
items.title_zh: Polymarket 的预测市场赢家与输家：证据
items.summary_en: A study using Polymarket data examines who wins and loses in prediction markets, shedding light on information aggregation, incentives, and potential mispricings. The findings have implications for designers of prediction platforms and for investors considering crowd-sourced forecasts.
items.summary_zh: 基于 Polymarket 的数据研究谁在预测市场获胜、谁在亏损，揭示信息聚合、激励机制与潜在错价。研究结果对预测平台的设计者以及考虑依赖群体预测的投资者都具备启示意义。

items.title_en: The Letter S, by Donald Knuth (1980) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 唐纳德·克努斯的字母 S（1980）[PDF]
items.summary_en: Donald Knuth's 1980 essay on the letter S dives into typography, shape, and legibility, reflecting the craft behind printed text. It remains a touchstone for typographers and designers alike.
items.summary_zh: 1980 年，Knuth 的《字母 S》探讨了字形、可读性和排版技艺，揭示了印刷文字背后的匠心。该文成为字体设计领域的经典参考。

items.title_en: Robert X Cringely is back to blogging
items.title_zh: Robert X. Cringely 重新开博
items.summary_en: Robert X. Cringely returns to blogging, promising commentary on tech history, policy, and industry shifts from a veteran perspective. His comeback highlights the enduring value of long-form insights in a fast-moving ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Robert X. Cringely 重新开博，承诺从资深视角就科技历史、政策与行业变迁进行深度评论。作为资深读者的观点回归，强调在快节奏生态中长篇洞察的持续价值。

items.title_en: Show HN: Rmux – A programmable terminal multiplexer with a Playwright-style SDK
items.title_zh: Show HN：Rmux——具备 Playwright 风格 SDK 的可编程终端多路复用器
items.summary_en: Rmux is a programmable terminal multiplexer powered by a Playwright-style SDK, enabling automated terminal sessions and CLI workflows. It exposes scriptable control over panes, sessions, and commands, unlocking reproducible end-to-end testing and automation for developers.
items.summary_zh: Rmux 是一个可编程的终端多路复用器，具备 Playwright 风格的 SDK，使你能够自动化终端会话和 CLI 工作流。它提供对分屏、会话和命令的脚本化控制，帮助开发与测试人员实现可重复的端到端场景。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open-source .docx editor library for building document apps
items.title_zh: Show HN：开源 .docx 编辑器库，用于构建文档应用
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces an open-source .docx editor library for building document-centric applications, enabling programmatic creation, editing, and rendering of Word-like documents within apps. Likely highlights API, extensibility, and use cases for developers building word processors or CMS editors.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍一个开源的 .docx 编辑器库，便于在应用中构建文档为中心的编辑能力，实现对 Word 风格文档的创建、编辑与呈现。强调 API、可扩展性及在文字处理器或 CMS 编辑器中的应用场景。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Runtime (YC P26) – Sandboxed coding agents for everyone on a team
items.title_zh: Launch HN: Runtime（YC P26）——为团队中的每个人提供沙盒化编码代理
items.summary_en: Launch HN introduces Runtime, a YC P26 company building sandboxed coding agents for teams. The idea is to let safe, restricted AI agents run in isolated sandboxes to assist coding without risking the broader system. Early-stage, promising for improving team collaboration if governance and security are well-handled.
items.summary_zh: Launch HN 推出 Runtime，YC 第26轮创业公司，面向团队提供沙盒化编码代理。该思路让经受严格隔离的 AI 助手在沙盒中协助编程，降低对整体系统的风险。处于初期阶段，若治理与安全得当，或提升团队协作效率。

items.title_en: Where are all the UK red telephone kiosks?
items.title_zh: 英国红色电话亭都去哪儿了？
items.summary_en: UK red telephone kiosks are increasingly scarce, with a project cataloging the remaining kiosks and their repurposed uses. The effort highlights how public infrastructure and cultural artifacts are evolving in a digital era.
items.summary_zh: 英国红色电话亭正在逐渐减少，一项项目在整理剩余的亭子及其改造用途。 这一努力揭示了在数字化快速发展的背景下，公共基础设施和文化符号的演变与保留挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pablo – a Chrome extension that copies UI from any website
items.title_zh: Show HN：Pablo——一款可复制任意网站 UI 的 Chrome 扩展
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces Pablo, a Chrome extension that copies UI from any website. The tool can accelerate prototyping and design exploration, but raises concerns about copyright, user experience integrity, and potential misuse for cloning interfaces.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 推出 Pablo，一款能复制任意网站界面的 Chrome 扩展。该工具有助于原型设计与界面探索，但也引发关于版权、用户体验完整性及潜在滥用的担忧。

items.title_en: FatGid: FreeBSD 14.x kernel local privilege escalation
items.title_zh: FatGid：FreeBSD 14.x 内核本地权限提升漏洞披露
items.summary_en: FatGid identifies a local privilege escalation in the FreeBSD 14.x kernel. The disclosure details a vulnerability that could allow unprivileged users to gain elevated privileges on affected systems, with advisories and patches likely on the horizon. It underscores ongoing kernel security research in BSD ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: FatGid 指出 FreeBSD 14.x 内核中的本地权限提升漏洞。漏洞可能让未授权用户获得提升权限，相关公告和修补程序预计将随之发布，凸显了 BSD 生态系统中持续的内核安全研究。

items.title_en: Museum of Pocket Calculating Devices
items.title_zh: 袖珍计算器博物馆
items.summary_en: The Museum of Pocket Calculating Devices curates miniature calculators across history, tracing the evolution of handheld computation and user interfaces. The collection highlights how increasingly compact devices reshaped computing on the go.
items.summary_zh: 袖珍计算器博物馆收集了历史上各式袖珍计算器，展示了手持计算设备的演变及用户界面的发展。

items.title_en: Show HN: Agent.email – sign up via curl, claim with a human OTP
items.title_zh: Show HN：Agent.email——通过 curl 注册，以人工一次性口令进行认领
items.summary_en: Agent.email demonstrates an ultra-minimal sign‑up flow: register via curl and claim with a human OTP, blending automation with a low-friction onboarding check. The approach raises interesting questions about security vs. convenience in onboarding workflows.
items.summary_zh: Agent.email 展示一种极简注册流程：通过 curl 注册，使用人工一次性口令进行认领，将自动化与人工验证结合起来。 这一做法引发关于注册便捷性与安全性之间权衡的讨论。

items.title_en: Was my $48K GPU server worth it?
items.title_zh: 我的 4.8 万美元 GPU 服务器值吗？
items.summary_en: A personal evaluation questions whether a USD 48K GPU server delivers value, comparing it to cloud options and workload needs, utilization, and total cost of ownership.
items.summary_zh: 对一台 4.8 万美元的 GPU 服务器进行价值评估，比较云端与本地部署的成本、利用率与工作负载需求，以判断性价比。

items.title_en: Mycorrhizal Fungi, Nature's Key to Plant Survival and Success
items.title_zh: 菌根真菌：植物生存与繁盛的自然之钥
items.summary_en: Mycorrhizal fungi form networks that extend plant root systems, aiding nutrient and water uptake and enabling communication between plants. Understanding this symbiosis has practical implications for sustainable agriculture and ecosystem resilience.
items.summary_zh: 菌根真菌通过形成网络扩展植物根系，帮助营养和水分吸收，并促进同群植物之间的信号传递。理解这一共生关系对可持续农业和生态系统韧性具有现实意义。

items.title_en: Scientists solve 200-year-old puzzle of how tobacco plants make nicotine
items.title_zh: 科学家破解烟草植物合成尼古丁的200年谜题
items.summary_en: Scientists solve a 200-year-old puzzle of how tobacco plants synthesize nicotine, revealing the enzymes and steps behind nicotine biosynthesis. The discovery opens paths for metabolic engineering and could inform crop improvement and pest management strategies.
items.summary_zh: 科学家破解了烟草植物合成尼古丁的200年难题，揭示了相关酶和生物合成步骤。此发现为代谢工程和作物改良、害虫管理等方向提供新途径。

items.title_en: The first British person in space
items.title_zh: 英国首位太空人背后的惊人故事
items.summary_en: Helen Sharman became the UK's first astronaut after a televised competition and a Cold War-era collaboration with the Soviet space program. Her unlikely path, driven by public science education and serendipity, underscored how non-traditional routes can open access to space.
items.summary_zh: 赫伦·夏尔曼通过一场公开的电视竞赛和 Cold War 时期的苏联太空计划合作成为英国首位太空人。她的非同寻常之路依赖公众科普与偶然机遇，凸显了非传统路径也能打开通往太空的大门。

items.title_en: The death of the brick and mortar toy store
items.title_zh: 实体玩具店的衰落
items.summary_en: Brick-and-mortar toy stores are closing at growing rates as online shopping and digital entertainment siphon foot traffic and margins. The piece analyzes how inventory strategies, margins, and local economic factors are reshaping physical toy retail, with implications for creators and small businesses.
items.summary_zh: 实体玩具店因线上购物和数字娱乐分流客流与利润而迅速关闭。文章分析了存货策略、利润率和地方经济因素如何改变线下玩具零售格局，并对创作者与小企业的前景产生影响。

items.title_en: What Do Gödel's Incompleteness Theorems Mean?
items.title_zh: 哥德尔不完备性定理到底意味着什么？
items.summary_en: Gödel's incompleteness theorems are explained in accessible terms, clarifying what they mean for formal systems and the limits of proving mathematical truths within a fixed set of rules.
items.summary_zh: 对哥德尔不完备性定理进行通俗解释，阐明它们对形式系统的局限以及在固定公理体系内证明数学真理的边界。文中讨论了对计算机科学、人工智能与证明本质的影响。

items.title_en: Fender escalates legal campaign against S-style guitars
items.title_zh: Fender 对 S-型吉他制造商扩大法律行动
items.summary_en: Fender expands legal action against S-style guitar makers, possibly targeting LSL Instruments over trademark or design rights. The move underscores ongoing IP battles in guitar hardware and the market for licensed Fender designs, with implications for small manufacturers and customization communities.
items.summary_zh: Fender 对 S 型吉他制造商扩大法律行动，可能涉及商标或设计权等问题。这凸显吉他硬件领域持续的知识产权之战，并对小厂商与定制社区产生潜在影响。

items.title_en: Mounting git commits as folders with NFS (2023)
items.title_zh: 通过 NFS 将 Git 提交挂载为文件夹
items.summary_en: Mounting Git commits as folders via NFS lets you browse repository history as if each commit were a distinct directory. It simplifies quick visual inspection of tree states across machines but may incur performance and metadata pitfalls. Useful for exploration, less for production workflows.
items.summary_zh: 通过 NFS 将 Git 提交挂载为文件夹，使你可以把每个提交当作独立目录来浏览提交树的状态。便于跨设备快速查看历史分支，但可能带来性能和元数据方面的问题，适合探索用途而非正式生产工作流。

items.title_en: What Is Happening to Publishing?
items.title_zh: 出版业在发生什么？
items.summary_en: Publishing is evolving under pressure from the internet, AI, and changing business models. The piece surveys currents shaping journals and presses, including open access, author rights, and sustainable revenue.
items.summary_zh: 出版业在互联网、人工智能和商业模式变化的压力下持续演变。文章梳理当前影响期刊与出版社的因素，如开放获取、作者权益与可持续收入模式。

items.title_en: Pokélike
items.title_zh: Pokélike：像宝可梦的项目
items.summary_en: Pokélike is a Pokémon-inspired project exploring indie development and open design principles. The initiative leans into modular gameplay and community-driven development to reimagine how a Pokémon-like experience could be built and evolved over time.
items.summary_zh: Pokélike 是一个受宝可梦启发的项目，探索独立开发与开放设计原则。该计划强调模块化玩法与社区驱动开发，尝试以可持续方式构建与演化一个类似宝可梦的体验。

items.title_en: Deciphering the Hashihara Castle Town Map
items.title_zh: 解读 Hashihara 城镇地图的秘密
items.summary_en: The Hashihara Castle Town map is decoded to reveal layout decisions, cartographic methods, and historical context behind town development around the fortress. The analysis sheds light on how maps preserve memory and influence historical interpretation.
items.summary_zh: 对 Hashihara 城镇地图的解读揭示了城镇布局、制图方法及城堡周边历史发展的背景。分析帮助人们理解地图如何保存记忆并影响历史解读。

items.title_en: Tristan Davey's Punch Card Archive
items.title_zh: Tristan Davey 的打孔卡档案
items.summary_en: Tristan Davey’s Punch Card Archive curates scans and metadata from vintage punched cards, preserving early computing history for researchers and enthusiasts. The collection offers a tangible window into how programs were stored and manipulated before modern digitization.
items.summary_zh: Tristan Davey 的打孔卡档案收集并整理了早期 punched cards 的扫描件与元数据，为研究者和爱好者保留了珍贵的计算史。该收藏提供了一个直观的窗口，展示在数字化普及前程序如何被存储和操作。

items.title_en: The Hardware Lottery
items.title_zh: 硬件彩票：决定 AI 研究成败的硬件壁垒
items.summary_en: The Hardware Lottery argues that many algorithmic breakthroughs hinge on the right hardware support arriving at the right time. It emphasizes how hardware evolution—such as specialized accelerators and memory bandwidth—can gate or accelerate progress, urging closer collaboration between researchers and hardware designers.
items.summary_zh: 硬件彩票认为，许多算法性突破的成败往往取决于在合适的时间获得合适的硬件支持。文章强调硬件演进（如专用加速器和内存带宽）对研究进展的制约或催化作用，呼吁研究者与硬件设计者之间的更紧密协作。
